mapper.insert: insert into department (name, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM department
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
order by department.update_time desc
select count(1) from teacher_users where department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.update: update department set teacher_count = #{teacherCount}, student_count = #{studentCount}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status sis INNER JOIN student_users su ON sis.student_id = su.id INNER JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id WHERE m.department_id = #{departmentId} AND sis.status = 2

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_users su INNER JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id WHERE m.department_id = #{departmentId} AND (sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status sis INNER JOIN student_users su ON sis.student_id = su.id INNER JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id WHERE m.department_id = #{departmentId} AND sis.status = 1
mapper.update: update department set confirmed_count = #{confirmedCount}, not_found_count = #{notFoundCount}, has_offer_count = #{hasOfferCount}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
